name: RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 4.20% Series G Preference Shares
summary: RenaissanceRe Holdings Ltd. is a global provider of reinsurance and insurance. The company offers a range of products, including property, casualty, and specialty reinsurance. RenaissanceRe is headquartered in Pembroke, Bermuda.
